# AboutIAM

> AboutIAM is an open-source, 100% client-side, browser-native academy and simulation workbench for Identity and Access Management (IAM). It teaches OAuth 2.0/OIDC, SAML, JWT, FIDO2/WebAuthn, ABAC/RBAC, LDAP, Zero Trust, ZKPs, and SPIFFE/SPIRE through hands-on, interactive playgrounds rather than static documentation, with progressive detail for both beginners and expert architects. Every cryptographic operation and policy evaluation runs natively in the browser — there is no backend, no telemetry, and no server-side data collection.

Runs entirely client-side (React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Zustand). Source: https://github.com/mayankrajjaiswal/aboutiam (MIT licensed). Live site: https://www.aboutiam.com/.

## Core Platform

- [AboutIAM Overview Dashboard](https://www.aboutiam.com/): Interactive Identity and Access Management (IAM) learning platform — track your progress across IAM Academy courses, playgrounds, and security tools.

## Playgrounds

- [IAM Playgrounds — Free Interactive Security Simulators](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/): Hands-on OAuth, SAML, JWT, FIDO2, Kerberos, and Zero Trust simulators — learn identity security by attacking and defending live in your browser.
- [JWT Playground — Sign, Crack & Exploit Tokens Live](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/jwt/): Sign real HS256 JSON Web Tokens in your browser, then exploit the alg:none bypass and JWKS-spoofing vulnerabilities hands-on.
- [OAuth 2.0 & OIDC Flow Visualizer — Step-by-Step Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/oauth/): Watch a real OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect authorization code flow unfold step-by-step with PKCE, animated redirects, and raw HTTP inspection.
- [SAML 2.0 Playground — XML Assertions & Signature Wrapping](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/saml/): Build SAML assertions and launch a live Signature Wrapping (SSW) attack against a mock Service Provider — entirely in your browser.
- [FIDO2 & WebAuthn Playground — Passkey Registration Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/fido2/): Emulate a full FIDO2/WebAuthn passkey registration and login ceremony, parsing real clientDataJSON and authenticatorData bytes.
- [ABAC vs RBAC Playground — Access Control Policy Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/access/): Evaluate live attribute-based (ABAC) and role-based (RBAC) access decisions side-by-side against device, location, and department context.
- [LDAP Playground — Active Directory Filter Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ldap/): Search a simulated Active Directory tree with real RFC 4515 LDAP filters and watch matching nodes highlight instantly.
- [Zero Trust Playground — NIST SP 800-207 Risk Planner](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/zta/): Model a NIST SP 800-207 Zero Trust risk-scoring engine and see how device, network, and identity signals change access outcomes live.
- [SCIM Playground — User Provisioning Sync Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/scim/): Simulate real-time SCIM 2.0 user and group provisioning between an Identity Provider and Service Provider, including 429/409 sync conflicts.
- [OAuth 2.0 Attack Lab — PKCE Bypass & Redirect Hijack Playground](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/oauth-attack/): Hack and defend a mock OAuth 2.0 flow: exploit PKCE downgrade, wildcard redirect URIs, and CSRF state omission, then patch each vulnerability.
- [Kerberos Playground — Golden & Silver Ticket Attack Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/kerberos/): Walk through a full Kerberos AS/TGS ticket exchange, then forge Golden and Silver Tickets against a simulated Active Directory domain.
- [Identity CTF Arena — Free IAM Hacking Challenges](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ctf/): Solve browser-native capture-the-flag challenges covering JWT bypasses, SAML wrapping injections, and LDAP filter escapes, with a live scoreboard.
- [AI Identity Architect — Generate IAM Blueprints Instantly](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/identity-architect/): Answer a few questions about your organization and generate a bespoke, compliance-ready identity architecture, threat model, and OPA policy.
- [JWT Cracker — HMAC Secret Dictionary Attack Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/jwt-cracker/): Watch a client-side dictionary attack recover a weak HS256 JWT signing secret in seconds, and learn why short shared secrets are dangerous.
- [mTLS & Certificate Chain Playground — PKI Trust Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/cert-chain/): Build a Root → Intermediate → Leaf Certificate Authority chain, then simulate real-time OCSP and CRL revocation checks and mTLS handshakes.
- [Active Directory GPO Simulator — Password Policy Playground](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/gpo-simulator/): Configure Default Domain GPO password length, lockout thresholds, and Kerberos ticket lifetimes, then watch simulated logon lockouts play out.
- [Enterprise IAM Architecture Builder — Drag & Drop Designer](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/reference-builder/): Drag and drop identity components to design an enterprise topology, with animated OIDC, SAML, and SCIM handshake traces between them.
- [Session Hijacking Playground — Token Theft & DPoP Defense Lab](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/session-hijacking/): Simulate an infostealer stealing a session cookie, then compare how DPoP, IP-binding, and CAEP each stop the replayed token from working.
- [Conditional Access Playground — Policy Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/conditional-access/): Evaluate simulated sign-in requests against device compliance, network, geolocation, and risk-score conditional access policies.
- [Open Policy Agent (OPA) & Rego Playground — Live Policy Editor](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/opa/): Write real Rego authorization rules against custom input JSON and trace how the OPA policy engine evaluates each decision.
- [Token Exchange Playground — RFC 8693 STS Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/token-exchange/): Model a Security Token Service broker exchanging an incoming token for a scoped, delegated, or impersonated downstream access token.
- [ITDR Playground — Identity Threat Detection Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/itdr/): Monitor a live authentication log stream, inject brute-force and push-fatigue attacks, and trigger automated lockout countermeasures.
- [Device Posture Playground — Zero Trust Attestation Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/device-trust/): Simulate a Zero Trust device-posture handshake checking firewall state, disk encryption, OS version, and client certificates before granting access.
- [Passkey Internals Playground — WebAuthn Byte-Level Explorer](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/passkey-internals/): Deconstruct the raw authenticatorData byte offsets and CBOR public keys a hardware TPM generates during passkey registration.
- [AI Deepfake vs MFA Playground — Voice Spoofing Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ai-threat-lab/): Simulate an AI voice-deepfake attack against legacy phone-based MFA and see why FIDO2 hardware-bound credentials resist it.
- [Zero-Knowledge Proof Wallet — Age Verification Playground](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/zkp-wallet/): Generate a real zero-knowledge proof that verifies you are over an age threshold without ever revealing your actual birthdate.
- [Ambient Trust Playground — Continuous Authentication Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ambient-trust/): Watch a session trust score decay and recover in real time as simulated keystroke and location telemetry signals change.
- [SPIFFE/SPIRE Playground — Workload Identity Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/workload-mesh/): Issue dynamic X.509 SVID credentials between simulated microservices and see how workload identity replaces static API keys.
- [XACML 3.0 Playground — Policy Combining Algorithm Engine](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/xacml/): Evaluate real XACML 3.0 rules and compare deny-overrides, permit-overrides, first-applicable, and only-one-applicable combining algorithms live.
- [GNAP Playground — Grant Negotiation Protocol Visualizer](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/gnap/): Step through an RFC 9635 GNAP grant request, user interaction, continuation, and key-bound token issuance timeline.
- [CAEP Playground — Continuous Access Evaluation Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/caep/): Push signed Security Event Tokens between a transmitter and receiver to see how CAEP revokes sessions and reacts to risk changes in real time.
- [Verifiable Credentials & DID Playground — Issuer/Holder/Verifier Flow](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/vc-did/): Issue, hold, and verify a real Ed25519 Verifiable Credential and Presentation entirely in your browser.
- [Auth Matchmaker — Find Your Ideal Authentication Stack](https://www.aboutiam.com/explore/matchmaker/): Answer a short wizard and get a recommended authentication stack with copyable boilerplate code for your exact requirements.
- [Identity Broker Playground — Multi-Tenant SSO Federation Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/identity-broker/): Explore multi-tenant single sign-on routing and real-time SAML-to-OIDC token translation across a federated identity broker.
- [Magic Link & Step-Up Auth Playground — Passwordless Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/magic-link-stepup/): Log in with a passwordless email magic link, then trigger a forced step-up to WebAuthn or OTP before completing a high-risk action.
- [Credential Stuffing Defense Playground — Password Spray Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/credential-stuffing/): Replay leaked credentials against a mock login and toggle rate-limiting, CAPTCHA, breached-password detection, and lockout defenses to stop them.
- [CIAM Consent Playground — Social Login & Progressive Profiling](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/ciam-consent/): Simulate a social login consent screen, OAuth scope grants, and progressive profile-field collection across multiple sessions.
- [Access Certification Playground — SoD Review Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/access-certification/): Review simulated user-to-entitlement access rows, approve or revoke access, and flag Separation-of-Duties conflicts like a real IGA campaign.
- [Risk-Based Authentication Playground — Adaptive MFA Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/risk-engine/): Combine impossible-travel, device-reputation, and behavior-anomaly signals into a composite risk score that drives allow, step-up, or block.
- [PAM Vaulting Playground — Just-in-Time Elevation Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/pam-vaulting/): Check out a vaulted credential, request time-boxed JIT elevation with approval, and watch session recording and auto-rotation on check-in.
- [Hybrid Identity Sync Playground — PHS vs PTA vs Federation](https://www.aboutiam.com/playground/hybrid-ad-sync/): Toggle between Password Hash Sync, Pass-Through Authentication, and AD FS Federation to see how each handles the same on-prem login.

## Security Tools

- [Free Client-Side IAM & Security Tools](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/): 34 free, 100% browser-based identity and security utilities — JWT, SAML, X.509, bcrypt, TOTP, PKCE, and more. No signup, no uploads, nothing leaves your device.
- [JWT Decoder — Inspect & Verify Tokens Online](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwt-decoder/): Paste any JSON Web Token to instantly decode its header, payload, and signature, check expiry, and flag insecure algorithms — 100% client-side, nothing is uploaded.
- [JWT Generator — Build & Sign Tokens (HS256/RS256)](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwt-generator/): Create and cryptographically sign JSON Web Tokens with custom claims using HS256, HS384, HS512, or RS256 — computed locally with the Web Crypto API.
- [Base64 & Base64URL Encoder / Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/base64-encoder-decoder/): Encode or decode text, JSON, and files to Base64 or URL-safe Base64 (used by JWTs) instantly in your browser — no data ever leaves your device.
- [SHA-256 & Hash Generator — Text and File Checksums](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/sha256-hash-generator/): Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes for text or files directly in your browser using the Web Crypto API — no uploads, ever.
- [HMAC Generator & Verifier (SHA-256/SHA-1/SHA-512)](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/hmac-generator/): Compute and verify HMAC signatures with a shared secret key using SHA-1, SHA-256, or SHA-512 — the same primitive that signs your JWTs, run locally.
- [UUID & ULID Generator (v4, v7, Bulk)](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/uuid-generator/): Generate cryptographically random UUIDv4, time-sortable UUIDv7, or ULID identifiers in bulk, with one-click copy — 100% client-side randomness.
- [Password Generator & Entropy Strength Checker](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/password-generator/): Generate strong random passwords or passphrases with custom rules, and see the exact entropy bits and estimated crack time — computed locally.
- [OAuth PKCE Code Generator (code_verifier / code_challenge)](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/oauth-pkce-generator/): Generate an RFC 7636-compliant PKCE code_verifier and S256 code_challenge, and build a full OAuth 2.0 authorization URL — no backend required.
- [TOTP Generator & Verifier (RFC 6238 Authenticator Codes)](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/totp-generator/): Generate live, time-based one-time passwords (TOTP) from any Base32 secret and verify 6-digit codes — the same algorithm behind Google Authenticator.
- [LDAP Filter Builder — Visual RFC 4515 Query Composer](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/ldap-filter-builder/): Compose valid LDAP search filters visually with AND/OR/NOT groups, then copy the exact RFC 4515 filter string — no directory connection needed.
- [SCIM Payload Validator & Builder (RFC 7643/7644)](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/scim-payload-validator/): Validate or scaffold SCIM 2.0 User and Group JSON payloads against the core schema, with inline errors for missing or malformed attributes.
- [Basic & Bearer Auth Header Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/basic-auth-decoder/): Decode HTTP Basic Authentication headers to reveal the username/password, or inspect Bearer tokens — a quick, private, client-side debugging utility.
- [JWK to PEM Converter (and back) + Thumbprint](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwk-pem-converter/): Convert RSA/EC JSON Web Keys (JWK) to PEM format and back, and compute the RFC 7638 JWK thumbprint — all cryptography runs in your browser.
- [X.509 Certificate Decoder — Parse PEM Certs & CSRs](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/x509-certificate-decoder/): Decode X.509 certificates and PKCS#10 CSRs to view subject, issuer, validity dates, SANs, key usage, and fingerprints — parsed locally, never uploaded.
- [SAML Decoder — Inspect SAMLRequest/Response & Metadata](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/saml-decoder/): Decode Base64/deflate-encoded SAMLRequest and SAMLResponse parameters, or pretty-print SP/IdP metadata XML — no server round-trip, fully client-side.
- [SAML Metadata Builder — Generate SP & IdP Metadata XML](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/saml-metadata-builder/): Visually configure compliant SAML 2.0 Service Provider (SP) or Identity Provider (IdP) XML metadata configurations, endpoints, certificates, and export completed files.
- [SCIM Diff & Reconciliation Tool — Calculate Sync Drift](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/scim-diff/): Input Identity Provider (IdP) and Service Provider (SP) user records to visually calculate attribute sync drift and programmatically generate standard-compliant SCIM PATCH reconciliation scripts.
- [X.509 CSR Generator — Compile PKCS#10 Requests Online](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/csr-generator/): Visually construct secure X.509 Certificate Signing Requests (CSR) with Subject DN attributes and SAN fields, generate browser-native private/public keys, and inspect their ASN.1 DER-parsed structure.
- [SD-JWT Decoder — Selective Disclosure JWT Inspector](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/sd-jwt-decoder/): Decode Selective Disclosure JWTs (SD-JWT), reveal individual disclosures, and verify each digest binding against the issuer-signed JWT — entirely in-browser.
- [WebAuthn / Passkey Assertion & Attestation Decoder](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/webauthn-decoder/): Decode clientDataJSON, authenticatorData, and CBOR attestationObject from a WebAuthn credential to inspect flags, counters, and public keys.
- [DID Generator — Create a did:key Identifier](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/did-key-generator/): Generate an Ed25519 keypair entirely in your browser and derive its did:key decentralized identifier and DID document — no wallet, no blockchain.
- [bcrypt Hash Generator & Verifier Online](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/bcrypt-generator/): Hash passwords with bcrypt at a custom cost factor, or verify a password against an existing bcrypt hash — computed entirely client-side, in pure JavaScript.
- [OAuth 2.0 / OIDC Request Builder & Handshake Debugger](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/oauth-builder/): Visually construct standard-compliant OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect authorization URLs and token exchange payloads.
- [JWKS JSON Web Key Set Inspector](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/jwks-inspector/): Parse, inspect, and validate public JSON Web Key Sets (JWKS) representing cryptographic signing keys used for JWT verification.
- [ABAC & RBAC Client-Side Policy Evaluator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/policy-evaluator/): An interactive sandbox to evaluate custom JSON-based access policies against simulated user, device, and resource contexts.
- [Diceware Passphrase & Entropy Strength Calculator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/passphrase-entropy/): Compare standard character-shuffled passwords against word-based dictionary passphrases to calculate mathematical entropy bits and offline GPU cracking times.
- [OIDC Discovery Document Auditor](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/oidc-discovery/): Parse, visualize, and audit modern Identity Provider metadata profiles containing standard OIDC endpoint registries.
- [Ansible Vault Encryptor & Decryptor](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/ansible-vault/): Encrypt or decrypt secrets client-side using the standard Ansible Vault 1.1/1.2 AES-256 cipher format — 100% browser-native PBKDF2 + AES-CTR + HMAC-SHA256.
- [Mozilla SOPS — GitOps Secrets Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/sops-simulator/): An interactive envelope encryption playground. Selectively encrypt configuration values in YAML or JSON files using simulated AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, or Age keys, preserving key paths for Git diffs.
- [Hardware Key Ring & HSM Emulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/key-ring/): Generate, store, and execute asymmetric and symmetric cryptographic keys locally inside your browser's secure sandbox — emulating a corporate Hardware Security Module (HSM).
- [Standards Conformance Checker](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/conformance-checker/): Paste an OIDC discovery document or SAML 2.0 metadata XML and run an automated pass/fail checklist against required fields and structural rules — 100% client-side.
- [PBKDF2 Key Derivation & Hash Verifier](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/pbkdf2-generator/): Derive a key from a password using PBKDF2 with a configurable salt, iteration count, and hash function, and verify a password against a stored derived hash — all via the Web Crypto API.
- [PEM Certificate Bundle Splitter & Chain Order Checker](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/cert-bundle-splitter/): Paste a multi-certificate PEM bundle to split it into individual certificates, inspect each one's subject/issuer/expiry, and check whether the leaf-to-root chain order is correct.
- [DID Document Validator & Resolver Preview](https://www.aboutiam.com/tools/did-document-validator/): Paste a Decentralized Identifier (DID) Document JSON and validate it against the W3C DID Core structural requirements, with a pretty-printed, field-by-field resolved preview.

## Advanced Ecosystem & Governance

- [IAM for Beginners — What Is Identity & Access Management?](https://www.aboutiam.com/primer/): A plain-English introduction to Identity and Access Management: Identify, Authenticate, Authorize, Audit — no prior security background required.
- [IAM Learning Roadmap — Zero to Hero Pathway](https://www.aboutiam.com/roadmap/): A guided, chronological learning sequence connecting every AboutIAM course track, from IAM fundamentals to Zero Trust architecture.
- [IAM Academy — Free Identity & Access Management Courses](https://www.aboutiam.com/learn/): 6 course tracks and 36 modules covering OAuth, SAML, SCIM, Zero Trust, and PAM, with persisted completion progress and role-based recommendations.
- [IAM Reference Architecture Center — 24 Identity Diagrams](https://www.aboutiam.com/architecture/): 24 clickable, beginner-to-advanced reference identity architectures — from basic session login and LDAP bind auth up through Zero Trust, B2B SaaS, and Multi-Cloud SPIFFE/SPIRE — each with threat models and simulated handshake traces.
- [IAM Vendor Comparison — Okta, Entra, Keycloak & More](https://www.aboutiam.com/vendor/): 18 comprehensive enterprise IAM vendor deep-dives: Microsoft Entra, Okta, Keycloak, CyberArk, Ping Identity, ForgeRock, SailPoint, Saviynt, WSO2, AWS, GCP, Oracle, Auth0, and more — architectures, certifications, deployment checklists, and interview questions.
- [Identity CVE Database & RFC Registry — IAM Security Research](https://www.aboutiam.com/research/): Track 13 critical identity CVEs (Log4Shell, Zerologon, JWT alg:none) with vulnerable/secure code patches, plus a 17-entry OAuth, OIDC, and SCIM RFC registry.
- [IAM Design Pattern Library — B2B SSO, Token Exchange & FIDO2](https://www.aboutiam.com/patterns/): Production-grade integration patterns, tradeoffs, and checklists for B2B multi-tenant SaaS, API token exchange (RFC 8693), and passwordless FIDO2.
- [IAM Certifications Guide — SC-300, CISSP, CyberArk & More](https://www.aboutiam.com/certifications/): 27 beginner-to-advanced identity, cloud, PAM, IGA, privacy, and GRC certifications — SC-900/SC-300/AZ-500, Okta, Ping, CyberArk, SailPoint, CISSP, CCSP, CISM — with study blueprints and mock practice quizzes.
- [Identity Security Bulletins — Real-World IAM Breach Playbooks](https://www.aboutiam.com/bulletins/): 18 incident bulletins on credential theft, MFA push fatigue, OAuth abuse, and Kerberos attacks, each paired with a hands-on Crisis Response simulator.
- [GRC Maturity Assessment — Free IAM Readiness Self-Test](https://www.aboutiam.com/assess/): A 5-pillar Identity Governance, Risk & Compliance maturity self-assessment with dynamic charts and an exportable roadmap.
- [IAM Interview Prep & Career Center — 6 Role Tracks](https://www.aboutiam.com/career-center/): Role-based interview preparation from Fresher to Principal, with MCQs, incident scenarios, system design audits, and resume guidance.
- [Identity Scenario Builder — Custom Architecture Generator](https://www.aboutiam.com/scenario-builder/): Describe your organization's footprint and get an instant, vendor-neutral secure identity architecture blueprint.
- [Interactive Identity Labs — Hands-On IAM Pen-Test Academy](https://www.aboutiam.com/labs/): Solve real OAuth, JWT, SAML, and SCIM security vulnerabilities in a browser-native penetration-testing sandbox.
- [Enterprise IAM Reference Implementations — Copyable Code](https://www.aboutiam.com/references/): Categorized, beginner-to-advanced library of production-quality, copyable IAM reference code — session auth, LDAP, OAuth/OIDC, WebAuthn, SCIM, OPA/Rego, Vault, cloud workload identity, Kubernetes RBAC, and Istio mTLS.
- [IAM Case Studies — Netflix, Uber, Cloudflare & More](https://www.aboutiam.com/case-studies/): 13 real-world, production-quality IAM implementation case studies across Big Tech, Financial Services, Government, and Healthcare.
- [Identity Architecture Decision Matrix — Protocol Recommender](https://www.aboutiam.com/decision-matrix/): Interactive architecture recommendation engine mapping standard protocols, authorization schemas, IdPs, checklists, and deep-linked tools.
- [IAM Threat Modeling Studio — STRIDE & MITRE ATT&CK Simulator](https://www.aboutiam.com/threat-modeling/): Visually build an IAM architecture and run threat analysis against STRIDE, MITRE ATT&CK, and OWASP, with dynamic risk scores and mitigation reports.
- [IAM Design Review Assistant — OAuth, SAML & JWT Auditor](https://www.aboutiam.com/design-review/): Interactive design reviewer executing automated structural audits on OAuth parameters, SAML XML, and JWT payload configurations.
- [IAM Standards & RFC Explorer — OAuth, SAML, SCIM, WebAuthn](https://www.aboutiam.com/standards/): 19 living identity standards with visual specifications and RFC timelines across OAuth, OpenID Connect, SCIM, SAML, and WebAuthn.
- [IAM Events & Conferences](https://www.aboutiam.com/events/): Upcoming Identity and Access Management conferences and summits — EIC, Identiverse, Gartner IAM Summit, Authenticate, RSA Conference, and KuppingerCole Impact Days — with dates, locations, and official links.
- [IAM Analyst Reports & Research](https://www.aboutiam.com/reports/): Curated abstracts, named leaders, and a cross-analyst leaderboard from the Gartner Magic Quadrant, Forrester Wave, and KuppingerCole Leadership Compass reports on Access Management, PAM, and CIAM, plus Thales's annual Data Threat Report research.
- [IAM Landscape Directory — Compare 21 Identity Products](https://www.aboutiam.com/explore/): Browse Open Source IdPs, Enterprise SaaS, CIAM, PAM, and Secrets Engines side-by-side, with license details and copyable integration snippets.
- [AI IAM Assistant — Knowledge Chat, Comparisons & Interview Prep](https://www.aboutiam.com/assistant/): Intelligent IAM platform navigator, 20 side-by-side protocol comparisons, a learning planner, and an interview prep simulator.
- [IAM Glossary — 182 Identity & Access Management Terms Defined](https://www.aboutiam.com/encyclopedia/): A searchable A-Z encyclopedia of Identity and Access Management standards, protocols, and acronyms, each with a beginner analogy and expert spec.
- [Interactive Identity Timeline](https://www.aboutiam.com/timeline/): An immersive, clickable, dual-themed timeline tracing the history of digital identity from 1961 mainframes to future ambient trust, with active inline simulators for each era.
- [Community Achievements & Challenges](https://www.aboutiam.com/community/): Unlock offline contributor achievements, tackle tactical security challenges, and trace your learning progression scoreboard.
- [Community Forums & Showcase](https://www.aboutiam.com/community-forums/): Browse expert architectural discussion boards, deconstruct hardened IAM code snippets, and federate your designed Reference Architectures.
- [IAM Breach Museum — 27 Real-World Identity Security Incidents](https://www.aboutiam.com/wall-of-shame/): Explore historic identity breaches like Golden SAML and MFA push-bombing fatigue, each with a vulnerable-vs-secure code deconstruction.
- [IAM Cheat Sheets — 24 Security Compliance Checklists](https://www.aboutiam.com/cheat-sheets/): Interactive hardening checklists for OAuth, SAML, JWT, Zero Trust, Kubernetes RBAC, SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR, with live compliance gauges.

## Optional

- [Team & Contact](https://www.aboutiam.com/contributors/): Meet the AboutIAM contributors and get in touch.
- [Terms, License & Disclaimer](https://www.aboutiam.com/terms/): MIT license details and educational-use disclaimer for AboutIAM's interactive identity security labs.

- [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/mayankrajjaiswal/aboutiam/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add modules, playgrounds, or fix bugs.
